canonical_definition: A Turkish Benchmark of Linguistic Minimal Pairs covering 16 grammatical phenomena, designed to evaluate the linguistic abilities of language models.
papers: Speech Vecalign: an Embedding-based Method for Aligning Parallel Speech Documents
